Generated Narrative: StructureDefinition ext-ems-airway-context

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Extension 0..*ExtensionEMS Airway Management Context
Slices for extension Content/Rules for all slices
extension:indications S0..*ExtensioneAirway.01 - Indications for Airway Management
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"indications"
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: EMS Airway Indications VS (required)
extension:confirmedDateTime S0..1ExtensioneAirway.02 - Date/Time Airway Device Placement Confirmed
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"confirmedDateTime"
value[x] 0..1dateTimeValue of extension
extension:deviceConfirmed S0..1ExtensioneAirway.03 - Device Being Confirmed
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"deviceConfirmed"
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: EMS Airway Device VS (required)
extension:confirmationMethod S0..*ExtensioneAirway.04 - Airway Device Confirmation Method
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"confirmationMethod"
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: EMS Airway Confirmation Method VS (required)
extension:tubeDepth 0..1ExtensioneAirway.05 - Tube Depth
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"tubeDepth"
value[x] 0..1QuantityValue of extension
Binding: BodyLengthUnits (preferred)
extension:confirmingPersonType S0..1ExtensioneAirway.06 - Type of Individual Confirming Airway
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"confirmingPersonType"
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: EMS Airway Confirming Person VS (required)
extension:complications S0..*ExtensioneAirway.08 - Airway Complications Encountered
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"complications"
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: EMS Airway Complications VS (required)
extension:failureReasons S0..*ExtensioneAirway.09 - Reasons Airway Management Was Not Successful
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"failureReasons"
value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: EMS Airway Failure Reasons VS (required)
extension:decisionDateTime 0..1ExtensioneAirway.10 - Date/Time Decision to Manage the Airway
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"decisionDateTime"
value[x] 0..1dateTimeValue of extension
extension:abandonedDateTime 0..1ExtensioneAirway.11 - Date/Time Airway Management Was Abandoned
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"abandonedDateTime"
value[x] 0..1dateTimeValue of extension
url 1..1uri"https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-airway-context"
value[x] 0..0Value of extension

Documentation for this format

name: EMSAirwayContext
title: EMS Airway Management Context
description: Contextual data for NEMSIS eAirway: indications, device confirmed, confirmation methods, confirming person, tube depth, crew member, complications, failure reasons, and decision/abandoned timestamps.

element.definition: Contextual data for NEMSIS eAirway: indications, device confirmed, confirmation methods, confirming person, tube depth, crew member, complications, failure reasons, and decision/abandoned timestamps.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

element.definition: Unique id for the element within a resource (for internal references). This may be any string value that does not contain spaces.

slicing.description: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url

element.definition: May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension.
element.comment: There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone.

element.comment: NEMSIS eAirway.01. Usage: Recommended. NV: NotRecorded. Repeating (1..M).

element.definition: Contextual data for NEMSIS eAirway: indications, device confirmed, confirmation methods, confirming person, tube depth, crew member, complications, failure reasons, and decision/abandoned timestamps.

element.comment: NEMSIS eAirway.01. Usage: Recommended. NV: NotRecorded. Repeating (1..M).

element.short: eAirway.02 - Date/Time Airway Device Placement Confirmed
element.comment: NEMSIS eAirway.02. Usage: Recommended. NV: NotRecorded.
NEMSIS eAirway.03. Usage: Recommended. NV: NotRecorded.
NEMSIS eAirway.04. Usage: Recommended. NV: NotRecorded. Repeating (1..M).
NEMSIS eAirway.05. Usage: Optional. Intubation tube depth in centimeters at the lip.

element.short: eAirway.06 - Type of Individual Confirming Airway
element.comment: NEMSIS eAirway.06. Usage: Recommended. NV: NotRecorded.
NEMSIS eAirway.08. Usage: Recommended. NV: NotRecorded. PN: ExamFindingNotPresent. Repeating (1..M).

element.short: eAirway.09 - Reasons Airway Management Was Not Successful
element.comment: NEMSIS eAirway.09. Usage: Optional. Repeating (0..M).

element.short: eAirway.10 - Date/Time Decision to Manage the Airway
element.comment: NEMSIS eAirway.10. Usage: Optional.

element.short: eAirway.11 - Date/Time Airway Management Was Abandoned
element.comment: NEMSIS eAirway.11. Usage: Optional.
